title: Integrating Medical and Physician Assistant Students Into Telemedicine: A Survey of Clinical Workflow and Platform Capabilities Among Clinical Students and Educators.
abstract: There has been a steady increase in the adoption of telemedicine over time, with a dramatic surge in use during the COVID-19 pandemic. This rapid expansion highlighted telemedicine's importance in healthcare delivery but created uncertainty for medical educators regarding how best to integrate clinical learners into virtual visits. To address this gap, we conducted a multi-institutional, cross-sectional survey using snowball sampling to evaluate telemedicine workflows used to incorporate clinical students into patient encounters during the pandemic.
